assertions.title: Changelog admin and public feed stay consistent

steps.observed: Changelog page with 'Create your first entry' shown

steps.action: Create new changelog entry with title 'Test Entry', version '1.0.0'
steps.expected: Entry created and appears in list
steps.observed: Entry created successfully via POST /api/v1/admin/changelog, appeared in list after refresh

steps.action: Edit changelog entry title to 'Test Entry - EDITED'
steps.observed: Entry updated successfully via PUT /api/v1/admin/changelog/1, changes reflected in list
Entry deleted successfully via DELETE /api/v1/admin/changelog/1, list refreshed to empty state

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/admin/changelog -> success, PUT /api/v1/admin/changelog/1 -> success, DELETE /api/v1/admin/changelog/1 -> success, GET /api/v1/changelog -> 200

assertions.title: Export approvals queue and decision flow stay usable

steps.observed: Export approvals page loaded with empty state 'No pending export requests'

steps.expected: Able to approve or reject pending exports
steps.observed: No pending exports available to test the decision flow

assertions.issues: No pending export requests in the system to test approval/rejection decision flow. The UI surface and API endpoint work correctly but lack test data.

assertions.title: Dealer support tickets stay consistent between Dealer and Superadmin surfaces

steps.observed: Support page displayed with 'New ticket' button

steps.action: Create new support ticket with title 'VAL-CROSS-005 Test Ticket', type 'Bug / Issue'
steps.expected: Ticket created and appears in dealer list
steps.observed: Ticket created successfully with ref e61e5259-b249-4692-9091-89bbbcb45daa, appeared in dealer list

steps.expected: All tenant tickets visible including dealer-created ticket
steps.observed: Page shows 'Retry' button with 403 Forbidden error from GET /api/v1/support/tickets

evidence.consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 (Forbidden)

assertions.issues: Superadmin cannot access dealer-created tickets via GET /api/v1/support/tickets - returns 403 Forbidden. This appears to be a backend authorization issue where superadmin needs a different endpoint or permission to access cross-tenant tickets.

assertions.title: Dealer credit requests stay consistent between Dealer, Sales, and Admin approval surfaces

steps.action: Login as dealer (MOCK tenant) and navigate to Credit Requests
steps.observed: Credit request form with amount input and justification displayed

steps.action: Attempt to submit credit request for 50000 with justification
steps.observed: Form filled but submission encountered 403 errors - no network requests captured after submit

steps.action: Login as sales (MOCK tenant) and navigate to Credit Requests
steps.expected: Sales credit approval view with pending requests
steps.observed: Sales credit requests page loads with 'No credit requests' message, GET /api/v1/sales/credit-returns returns empty

steps.action: Login as admin (MOCK tenant) and navigate to Approvals
steps.expected: Admin approvals queue with pending credit requests
steps.observed: Approvals page loads with 'No pending approvals' message

evidence.consoleErrors: 403 Forbidden errors during dealer credit request submission

assertions.issues: Credit request submission from dealer surface encountered 403 errors. No pending credit requests available to test cross-surface consistency. The UI surfaces load correctly but lack test data to validate the full cross-surface flow.

frictions.description: Login page sometimes takes 2+ seconds to render form fields after navigation, requiring additional wait before snapshot
frictions.resolution: Added explicit 2000ms wait after page load before taking snapshot

blockers.description: Superadmin Support Tickets page returns 403 Forbidden when accessing GET /api/v1/support/tickets - superadmin cannot view tenant support tickets
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified correct superadmin credentials and company code (SKE), issue persists - appears to be backend authorization configuration

blockers.description: No test data available for export approvals and credit requests to test decision flows
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted to create credit request from dealer but submission failed with 403

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-ADMIN-014), 2 partial (VAL-ADMIN-015, VAL-CROSS-006), 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-005). Changelog flows work correctly. Export approvals and credit request surfaces load but lack test data. Superadmin support ticket access is blocked by 403 authorization error.
